metadata.description: Minimal orthography rules for Curaçao Papiamentu validation

consonant_usage.c: Only in (ch) and mathematics, chemistry, proper names, foreign words
consonant_usage.j: Only in (dj) and proper names, foreign words
consonant_usage.q: Only in combinations and proper names, foreign words
consonant_usage.x: Only in combinations and proper names, foreign words
